lines.speaker: Banisoch
lines.text: It leads to the caves beneath this part of the island. I think there's dragons at the other end; you can hear the noises and smell the smoke coming up the passage.

lines.speaker: Banisoch
lines.text: Eh, I could sort something out for you. Thing is, my brother's got a job guarding the main entrance to the caves. I'd be undercutting him if I let people go down this hole.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, does this mean you won't let me go in?

lines.speaker: Banisoch
lines.text: No, it means I'd need something to assuage my conscience after betraying my brother. 5,000 trading sticks ought to cheer me up nicely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a deal - here's 5,000 trading sticks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I climb down that hole now?

lines.speaker: Banisoch
lines.text: Yes, you've paid, you can climb down there whenever you like. Go, go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you waiting by this hole?

lines.speaker: Banisoch
lines.text: Ever seen a toilet around here?

sections.title: When using a rope on the nearby hole before having paid Banisoch

lines.speaker: Banisoch
lines.text: Hey, I didn't say you could do that!

sections.title: When using an item on the nearby hole after having paid Banisoch

lines.speaker: Banisoch
lines.text: Either go down it or don't go down it, but stop messing around with it!
